content: Let me relate an experience and a connected set of ideas. When I was travelling in California I often carried a gold pan and searched the gravel creek beds for the soft shiny metal. Believe it or not I never found any while panning, but one time while relaxing on a riverside ledge I 'heard' a small sliver of gold which I dog out of the deepest corner of a small fissure in the rock. I don't know that I actually heard it although my memory tells me there was an actual ringing or audible vibration that initially urged me to ecavate the slight crack with the tip of my knife.
